description: Lock the 2026-07-03 charterparty correction to ship-hire/affreightment contracts grounded in contract law and maritime law, not banking or navigation documents.

checks.reason: A charterparty is itself an enforceable contract between shipowner and charterer.
Maritime law supplies the ship, cargo, freight, loss, and dispute domain around charterparty contracts.
Banking is adjacent trade finance context, not a direct prerequisite for ship-hire contract formation.
A charterparty is a legal shipping contract and does not require portolan charts as a direct legal prerequisite.
The corrected node is not scoped to Genoese notarial-register technology.
